project.name: The Whisk - AI-Powered Bakery Platform
project.description: An advanced e-commerce platform offering interactive 3D cake customization, AI-powered recommendations, voice ordering, and real-time order tracking with a Swiggy-like premium UI/UX.
unique_selling_points: Interactive 3D Custom Cake Builder with drag-and-drop toppings
AI-powered recommendation engine (occasion + budget + collaborative filtering)
Real-time order tracking with Supabase Realtime
Occasion-based smart bundles with dynamic pricing
Admin dashboard with analytics and inventory management

backend_database.edge_functions: Supabase Edge Functions (Deno) for AI logic

tables.name: profiles
tables.description: Extends Supabase auth.users with user-specific data

tables.name: products
tables.description: Catalog of all bakery items, bases, toppings, and fillings

tables.name: custom_designs
tables.description: Stores user-generated cake designs from the 3D builder

columns.name: config
columns.description: Complete 3D state: {shape, size, layers, flavors, icing_color, toppings: [], text:{message, font, color}}

tables.name: orders
tables.description: Main orders table with status tracking

tables.name: order_items
tables.description: Line items for each order (supports both standard products and custom designs)

tables.name: reviews
tables.description: User ratings and feedback for orders

columns.name: images
columns.description: Array of uploaded review image URLs

policies: Users can read only their own profile
Users can CRUD their own custom designs
Users can read/write only their own orders

features.name: 3D Custom Cake Builder
features.description: Interactive cake design interface with real-time 3D preview

sub_features.name: Live Preview
sub_features.interaction: Rotate via drag, zoom via pinch/scroll

features.ui_layout: Split screen: Left panel (wizard) + Right panel (3D canvas)

features.name: AI-Powered Recommendation Engine
features.description: Smart suggestions based on occasion, budget, and user behavior

algorithms.logic: Occasion + Flavor mapping (e.g., Birthday → Chocolate/Vanilla, Wedding → Red Velvet/Fruit Cake)
Users who ordered X also ordered Y (based on order history)
Filters recommendations within user's budget range

features.implementation: Supabase Edge Function calling OpenAI API or custom Python logic

features.name: Voice-Based Ordering
features.description: Conversational AI interface for hands-free ordering
workflow: Browser listens via Web Speech API
Edge Function parses intent (flavor, occasion, quantity)
Returns matching products or adds to cart
example_queries: I want a chocolate cake for birthday under ₹1000
Add a strawberry topping to my order
Show me eggless options for anniversary

features.name: Live Order Tracking
features.description: Real-time status updates using Supabase Realtime

features.name: Occasion-Based Quick Order & Smart Bundles
features.description: Pre-configured templates for common occasions with dynamic pricing
ui_components: Mood board style cards with high-res imagery

features.name: Admin Smart Dashboard
features.description: Analytics and management interface for bakery staff

features.name: Authentication & User Profiles
features.description: Secure access with JWT-based authentication via Supabase Auth

features.name: Ratings & Reviews
features.description: Social proof system with image uploads

features.name: Fake Payment Integration
features.description: Simulated payment flow for demo purposes

mobile.header: Sticky with search and cart icon

sprint_1.name: Foundation
tasks: Set up Supabase project, enable Auth
Setup Zustand store for user state
Configure Supabase Storage bucket for images

sprint_2.name: Core Commerce
tasks: Build Product Listing page (grid with filters)
Implement Checkout flow with address form
Admin: Basic order view and status update

sprint_3.name: Hero Feature - Cake Builder
tasks: Add texture mapping for icing and toppings
Add custom text tool with canvas texture

sprint_4.name: AI & Realtime Features
tasks: Build Edge Function for recommendation logic
Setup Supabase Realtime for order tracking
Build Live Order Tracking page with progress bar

sprint_5.name: Polish & Admin Dashboard
tasks: Build complete Admin Dashboard with charts

key_questions.question: Why did you choose Supabase over Firebase or traditional backend?
key_questions.answer: Supabase offers PostgreSQL, which gives me relational database capabilities crucial for handling complex relationships between orders, custom designs, and products. The built-in Realtime feature allows live order tracking without WebSocket setup, and Row Level Security provides granular access control. It's also open-source and offers generous free tier for projects.

key_questions.question: How does your recommendation engine work technically?
key_questions.answer: I implemented a hybrid approach. The core logic runs in a Supabase Edge Function. It combines rule-based filtering (occasion-flavor mapping) with collaborative filtering that analyzes order_history table to find 'users who ordered X also ordered Y' patterns. For advanced capabilities, it calls OpenAI API to generate natural language recommendations based on user preferences stored in profiles table.

key_questions.question: What makes your Custom Cake Builder different from standard e-commerce?
key_questions.answer: Unlike simple product selection, my builder creates a structured JSON configuration stored in the database. This configuration can be re-rendered by bakery staff for accurate replication. The 3D preview using Three.js provides realistic visualization with drag-and-drop toppings and custom text, eliminating guesswork for customers.

key_questions.question: How did you handle state management across the app?
key_questions.answer: I used Zustand for global state (user, cart, UI theme) because it's lightweight and requires less boilerplate than Redux. For server state (products, orders), I rely on Supabase queries with React Query for caching and synchronization. The custom builder uses local component state for real-time updates, only saving to database on finalization.

key_questions.question: How did you ensure security and prevent unauthorized access?
key_questions.answer: Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) policies ensure users can only access their own data. I implemented JWT authentication with Supabase Auth. All API calls are authenticated, and sensitive operations like order placement require valid session. Environment variables store all API keys securely.

project_differentiators: Complete 3D customization workflow, not just static product selection
AI-powered recommendations with real business logic (occasion + budget)
Real-time order tracking with Supabase subscriptions
Voice interface for accessibility and innovation

technical_challenges.solution: Used Three.js with optimized geometry, texture compression, and lazy loading. Implemented Level of Detail (LOD) for mobile devices.
Supabase Realtime subscriptions listen to order status changes. Updates propagate instantly to all connected clients.

technical_challenges.challenge: Complex JSONB queries for custom designs
technical_challenges.solution: Leveraged PostgreSQL JSONB operators for efficient querying of custom design configurations.
